notes:
First of all, thanks for over 1.4K downloads. The support has been unreal.

Play Anything (1.2.0)
Segue now mixes from way more than Spotify.

• Local files: VLC, Media Player, foobar and more. Full track info and skip on the new Media Player.
• Every browser: Firefox, Chrome, Edge, Opera, Brave and friends, each shown with its own logo.
• Close to tray: the X keeps Segue running in the background.
• Overlay, your way: drag it anywhere, 9 positions, always-on and cover-only modes.
• Smarter controls: pause and skip only ever hit your chosen source, never the wrong app.
• Check for updates right from the title bar.
• Improved sim wheel support, plus stability fixes.
headline: 🚀 Play Anything. Local files, every browser, and more.
